name: Kurbisbrai Mit Kase
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pumpkin into segments and remove the peeling and seeds.
2. Boil the pumpkin in salted water with ground ginger and sliced apples for 20 minutes until it becomes soft.
3. Pass the cooked pulp through a sieve to strain out any solids.
4. Blend the strained pulp with butter until smooth.
5. Season the mixture to taste with salt and pepper.
6. Place the blended mixture into a shallow dish.
7. Sprinkle grated cheese over the top of the mixture.
8. Brown under grill until the cheese is melted and lightly browned.
